title: cyclobalanopsis glauca var. elongata
intro: Cyclobalanopsis glauca var. elongata, also known as the Chinese evergreen oak or Lingchong, is a variant of the Cyclobalanopsis glauca tree species native to China and other parts of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis glauca var. elongata include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and improving digestion, among others. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to make medicinal tonics and supplements.
